text: EXPLAIN view launched — tafsir library with 29 editions across 21 works in 6 languages, filterable by author, tradition, language, surah
DIVE mode added to START — scholastic Quran reader with tafsir (multi-language), transliteration, Urdu translation, word-by-word morphology, and Lane's Lexicon root dictionary
Sign-in + subscriptions launched — Google and email accounts, tester/contributor/subscriber tiers, Discourse community forum at goldark.discourse.group
Tafsir cross-reference chips — 'cited in N tafsirs' on figure, event, book, and hadith cards; click to see every tafsir that mentions that entity
Hadith chips on figure and event cards — click to see every hadith linked to that person or event
Quran–Hadith cross-reference: 174,519 verse links across 3,937 verses. START view shows 'N hadiths' chip on every verse
Monastic drill rows now show cross-reference chips — click through to figures, verses, or events
Events scaled from 403 to 2,211 with AI-generated events and death-block entries
START view launched: full Quran reader, 114 surahs, 19 translations, side-by-side Arabic/English
Added Fakhr al-Din Iraqi to Study Room (+1 writer, slides + summary + video)
Empire overlay legend bar added to Map and Follow views
How This Works button standardized across all 11 views
Eras view rewrite complete with leaf timeline visualization
Hadith DRILL view launched in Monastic with 34,441 hadiths across 5 dating tiers
Books view launched with 989 books and 128 free reads
